name: vacas-engine-sdk
description: SDK do Sistema Vacas-Engine - Ferramentas de Desenvolvimento Treis

scripts.docker:db: docker compose up -d db_clone && docker compose run --rm db-migrator
scripts.docker:api: docker compose up -d db_clone && docker compose run --rm db-migrator && docker compose --profile api up -d
scripts.docker:refresh: docker compose --profile api down && docker compose pull && docker compose --profile api up -d --build --force-recreate
